_patch_meta.description: Supplemental verse_context inserts for H2617A (mti:536, chesed) — completes classification of 223 remaining verse records. Groups 536-001, 536-002, 536-003 already in database from primary patch. No new group inserts. After application Registry 103 completion check may proceed.

_notes.registry_103_gate: After this patch is applied and all integrity checks pass, Registry 103 (love) completion check may run. verse_context_status may advance to Complete if XREF conditions are also met.
